---
title: "Charles Wooldridge"
---

## Charles Wooldridge

**Dates:** (1832/3-1913)

### Description

solicitor

### Biography

<i>The Times</i> (4 December 1913), 6, refers to his 32-year tenure of the office of Diocesan Registrar for Winchester.

He married (1856) Margaret Sophia Bromley (1834/5-1888).

### Letters

- Letter from Mar 5 1896
- Letter from Jan 30th 1896
- Letter from Jan 29th [1896]
- Letter from Jan 29 1896
- Letter from Jan 28 1896
- Letter from Jan 27th  1896
- Letter from Jan 23d 1896
- Letter from Jan 22 1896
- Letter from July 16 1895
- Letter from June 29 1895
- Letter from June 14 1895
- Letter from April 11th 1895
- Letter from Apr 10 1895
- Letter from April 9th 1895
- Letter from Apr 8 1895
- Letter from April 5th 1895
- Letter from Apr 4 1895
- Letter from Feb 13 1895

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
